content.text:
The migration file has been created at `/home/claude/projects/axiom/supabase/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql`. It includes:

- 14 tables (users, students, parents, parent_student_links, study_plans, study_goals, daily_progress, conversations, messages, notes, video_watches, youtube_cache, flashcards, mind_maps)
- 17 indexes for query performance
- RLS enabled on all tables with role-based policies (student ownership, parent read access via links, public cache access)
- 2 trigger functions (invite code generation, auto-update of `updated_at`)
- 7 update triggers for timestamp management
